component.name: The Honkers Railway Launcher
component.summary: Play your favorite Honkai Railway game on Linux
Spielen Sie Ihr Lieblings-Honkai-Railway-Spiel auf Linux
Играйте в вашу любимую игру Honkai Railway на Linux
Juega a tu juego favorito de Honkai Railway en Linux
Gioca al tuo gioco preferito di Honkai Railway su Linux
Játssz a kedvenc Honkai Railway játékoddal Linux-on!

description.p: The Honkers Railway Launcher is an unofficial launcher for a certain video game that handles setting up Wine, installing the game and running it on Linux.
Der Honkers Railway Launcher ist ein inoffizieller Launcher für ein bestimmtes Videospiel, der die Installation von Wine, die Installation des Spiels und das Ausführen unter Linux übernimmt.
Honkers Railway Launcher - это неофициальный лаунчер для определённой видеоигры, который настраивает Wine, устанавливает игру и запускает её на Linux.
Honkers Railway Launcher es un launcher no oficial para un determinado videojuego que se encarga de configurar Wine, instalar el juego y ejecutarlo en Linux.
Honkers Railway Launcher è un launcher non ufficiale per un certo videogioco che gestisce la configurazione di Wine, l'installazione del gioco e l'esecuzione su Linux.
A Honkers Railway Launcher egy nem-hivatalos launcher egy bizonyos videojátékhoz, amely beállítja a Wine-t, telepíti a játékot és futtatja Linux-on.
Added "Import game" button
Added setting to enable Winewayland to make the game use Wayland instead of X11
Added additional methods of detecting game version
Fixed game version detection through game files
Changed .version file format to be an ascii text file that can be edited in a text editor. Old format files will still work correctly and will be overwritten on game update.
Changed sophon download and update backend, introducing performance improvements and various fixes
Added support for layered and animated backgrounds. You can disable video background in settings.
Fixed parts of the game update function to handle new files
Fixed a panic when the launcher folder is a broken symlink, the launcher will exit with an error message instead
Changed mfc140 installation method to not use winetricks
Added mfc140 dependency installation
Added 'remake prefix' button
Fixed game pre-downloading and repairing
Fixed game repair, which was broken due to change of the download/update method
Fixed insufficient debug.log message filtering, resulting in large log files on download/update
Changed the download and update method to anticipate future migration in the API
Fixed size of images in the "Appearance" preferences section (most noticeable on flatpak)
Updated default window size in classic appearance option to match the other launchers
Fixed the package name for libwebp-utils on Arch Linux
